reviews.review_msg: Absolutely awful teacher. Bahram did not answer emails and when I went to his office hours once and did not show up. He also canceled his only office hours a day before the final. The Course was entirely run by TAs and the prof only did an hour of reading slides out loud and prepared tests unrelated to assignments. one of the worst profs at sfu

Bahram is a super nice guy but has 0 teaching ability. During the online semester, he just pre-recorded videos of himself reading Pearson slide decks word for word and did nothing else. Exams featured questions never seen before on homework/textbook. Stopped providing practice questions after the first exam. Class was an absolute waste of money.
